items.final_wording: Supports documented procedure name, counts, specimen labeling, equipment problems, and key recovery or management concerns without generating a plan.

source.title: WHO Guidelines for Safe Surgery 2009: Safe Surgery Saves Lives — Surgical Safety Checklist and Implementation Manual
source.population: Patients undergoing surgery or invasive procedures where the checklist is applied.
source.setting: Operating room or procedural setting before anesthesia, before incision, and before leaving the room.
source.exclusions: Exact for checklist documentation of identity, site, procedure, consent, anesthesia equipment checks, pulse oximetry, allergy, airway or aspiration risk, blood loss, team communication, procedure record, counts, specimens, equipment issues, and recovery concerns. It does not replace local UAE policy.

exact_location.heading: Before patient leaves operating room — Sign Out

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports documented procedure name, counts, specimen labeling, equipment problems, and key recovery or management concerns without generating a plan.

items.rationale: Supports completed procedure, counts, specimen, equipment and recovery concerns at operating-room exit for post-operative ICU admission review; no decision is generated.

items.final_wording: Defines the postoperative surgical-wound population and supports wound dressing, cleansing, wound-healing, and structured postoperative wound-care documentation.

source.title: Surgical site infections: prevention and treatment — Recommendations
source.population: Adults, young people, and children having a surgical procedure involving a skin incision.
source.setting: Perioperative, postoperative, community, and specialist wound-care services.
source.exclusions: Exact for postoperative wound-care and surgical-site-infection documentation; partial for traumatic wounds, suture removal, and UAE pathways.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Defines the postoperative surgical-wound population and supports wound dressing, cleansing, wound-healing, and structured postoperative wound-care documentation.

items.rationale: Supports entered postoperative wound-care context for post-operative ICU admission review; no decision is generated.
